column1: # Adherence eval scenarios — tests whether rules fire when they should
# TYPE: positive = rule SHOULD fire; negative = rule should NOT fire
# EXPECTED_REGEX: pattern that signals correct rule-firing (for positive) or silence (for negative, leave as .)
# FORBIDDEN_REGEX: pattern that signals FAILURE (for positive: overreach; for negative: false-firing)
#   positive PASS = EXPECTED matches AND FORBIDDEN does not match
#   negative PASS = FORBIDDEN does not match
